title: M ETHOD   OF   C ONSTRUCTION 1. Take a rectangular chart paper of length   l   units and breadth   b   units [see Fig. 1].
subject: Mathematics
activityTitle: M ETHOD   OF   C ONSTRUCTION 1. Take a rectangular chart paper of length   l   units and breadth   b   units [see Fig. 1].
objective:
To obtain the formula for the surface area
of a sphere.
A ball, cardboard/wooden strips,
thick sheet of paper, ruler, cutter,
string, measuring tape, adhesive.
observation:
On actual measurement :
l   = ....................,   b   = .....................,
2
π   r   =   l   = ....................,   h   =   b   = ....................,
Area of the rectangular paper =   l   ×   b   = .................
Therefore, curved surface area of the cylinder = 2 π rh.
discussion:
This result can be used in finding the material used in making cylindrical
containers, i.e., powder tins, drums, oil tanks used in industrial units, overhead
water tanks, etc.
Mathematics   81
